metadata.title: Update Title on Rename
metadata.description: Update Title on Rename Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Updates the title even if it doesn't match the previous filename. Overwrites custom titles.
ast.target: 即使标题与之前的文件名不匹配也会更新标题。会覆盖自定义标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter key used to store the file title.
ast.target: 用于存储文件标题的前置键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds the title to frontmatter when renaming a file, if no title exists.
ast.target: 重命名文件时，如果标题不存在，则将标题添加到前置信息中。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将标题添加到前置信息
